title: Kerilt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:KeriltCaamas.jpg]] |name=Kerilt {{C|background)
[[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] (foreground}} |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] define the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] as the border of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] |sector=[[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]] |system=[[Algaran system]]''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]'' |coordinates=P-15 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Algar]] |orbited= |position=1 |moons=1 |routes=[[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial''[[I, Jedi]]'' |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*[[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] *Rainforest |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Caamasi (language)|Caamasi]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Morymento]] {{C|[[Capital/Legends|capital]]}} |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Caamasi Remnant]] }} '''Kerilt''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Algaran system]], covered by large rainforests. Many surviving [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] fled to Kerilt after the bombardment of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], founding the planet's first [[City/Legends|city]], [[Morymento]]. The planet was [[Battle of Algara|plundered]] by the [[Invids]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], although they left supplies for the colony to grow. From Kerilt, the Caamasi later relocated to [[Susevfi]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]'' *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021107caamas|text=Caamas, the Ruined World: ''Coruscant and the Core Worlds'' Preview #1}} *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Kerilt }} [[Category:Algaran system locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
